title: DL foundations consolidation + DSA Trees finish
focus: Run 60-min concept self-quiz on weeks 6 so far; finalize Trees pattern.

items.label: Perceptron, MLP, forward pass
interviewQuestions: Walk me through forward pass through a 2-layer MLP for binary classification.
Why can't a single perceptron solve XOR — and how does adding a hidden layer fix it?

items.label: Activations: sigmoid, tanh, ReLU, GELU, SwiGLU
interviewQuestions: Compare ReLU, Leaky ReLU, GELU, and SwiGLU — when does each shine?
Why did ReLU largely replace sigmoid/tanh in deep networks?
What is the dying ReLU problem and how do you mitigate it?

items.label: Weight initialization (Xavier, He)
interviewQuestions: Why does poor initialization cause vanishing or exploding gradients?
Compare Xavier vs He initialization — which goes with which activation and why?

items.label: Backprop on a computation graph
interviewQuestions: Derive backprop for a 2-layer MLP with cross-entropy loss.
Explain why automatic differentiation is reverse-mode for ML.

items.label: Vanishing & exploding gradients
interviewQuestions: Why does a deep sigmoid network suffer vanishing gradients?
How do residual connections, ReLU, and BN/LN help?

items.label: PyTorch autograd in 30 minutes
interviewQuestions: When would you use torch.no_grad() and detach()?
What does requires_grad=True actually do under the hood?
Explain the order loss.backward(), optimizer.step(), optimizer.zero_grad() in a PyTorch training loop.
